text: The Crab Nebula is a supernova remnant in Taurus. It contains a pulsar.
Cosmic microwave background radiation is about 2.7 Kelvin.
Active galactic nuclei can show relativistic jets.
Gravitational waves were first detected by LIGO from merging black holes.
Interstellar dust polarizes starlight and affects extinction curves.
